title: Aether: Basic Ores
description: Adds vanilla ores to the Aether! Compatible with Create & other mods.
body:
![Gold ore generated in aether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XrpsNJah/images/63aeb03932fac2c78c6547f551b7430502a94908.png)

Available on [Curseforge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aether-basic-ores) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-basic-ores)

## 📖 About

**Aether: Basic Ores** is a fanmade add-on for [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether). It adds overworld ore variants to the Aether dimension.

The main purpose of this mod is to add the ability to craft most items (including those from other mods) without leaving Aether, and to make each travel here more fun and rewarding. It's also lore-friendly: existance of these ores make it less weird for overworld metal things (rings, pendants, gloves, etc) to exist in Aether dungeon chests.

![Moa investigating new ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XrpsNJah/images/5ff36491528b7675ca1f78be1a1eded257532ff6.png)

## ☁️ Features

The only and main addition is the holystone ores (just like vanilla deepslate ores, but Aether-themed). Those include Coal, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Emerald, Lapis & Redstone. They all generate within the Aether dimension from Y=0 to Y=120, forming small deposits in holystone here and there. You can mine them using the same pickaxes that are suitable for their vanilla counterparts.

This mod is made with the anticipation of playing on modpacks. It has built-in support for [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) (crushing new ores sometimes produce holystone). It's also automatically compatible with most existing mods, including various industrial and tech mods & their processing machines. Here's a list of mods I'm sure are well-compatible:

- [Dragon Survival](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragons-survival) (neoforge 1.21.1+).
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [IC2 Classic](https://modrinth.com/mod/ic2classic)
- [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)
- [Thermal Series](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-expansion)
- [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering)


It's highly recommended to install this mod if you play [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) with [Aether Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aether-delight).
(Trust me, it's better to mine holystone iron ore than to melt down a lot of rings and pendants for iron nuggets, to just make a Cooking Pot).


## 💬 Permissions

✔️ You are allowed to include this mod in [Curseforge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aether-basic-ores) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-basic-ores) modpacks. Also feel free to use this mod in your videos (I would appreciate it if you leave a link to the mod page in the description).

❌ You are not allowed to reupload this mod to any other websites/launchers/apps, use contents of this mod (recipes, tags, etc) in other projects, sell this mod in any way or include in paid modpacks - this mod is free for all players.
